title: 6 Pack Premium Plastic Herb Grinder, Portable 60mm Spice Grinder with Magnetic Lid,3-Part Grinder Featuring Shark Tooth Shredding
features: 【Premium Material】 Crafted from high-quality, lightweight plastic, this grinder is built to last. Its ensures safe use for herbs, spices, and more, while resisting wear and tear.
【Strong Magnetic Closure】 Equipped with powerful magnets, this grinder ensures a secure closure that prevents spills and keeps your herbs fresh.
【Shark Tooth Shredding】 Designed with precision-engineered shark tooth for efficient and uniform grinding of herbs or spices.
【Portable Pocket Size】 With its slim, portable design, this 60mm grinder easily fits in pockets, bags, or kitchen drawers. Ideal for camping, travel, or everyday home use.
【Assorted Colors】 This grinder set comes in 6 colorss, each grinder adds a touch of style and fun to your collection. The vibrant colors make it a standout accessory for any herb enthusiast.
